steps.description: Click the "Copy" button below the validation code input on the Bot Connection Validation page to copy the displayed code.
Click the  browser tab at the top left to switch application context in the Chrome interface.
Right-click on the "Type a message" input box in the Microsoft Teams web app chat interface, indicated by a red crosshair at the lower center of the conversation window.
Click the "Paste" option in the context menu within the Microsoft Teams web chat interface, as indicated by the red crosshair at (268, 492).
Press the Enter key to submit the code in the message input box of the chat within Microsoft Teams web application.
Click the "View prompts" button in the message input toolbar at the bottom right of the Microsoft Teams web chat interface to open prompt suggestions from sso-botdev.
Click the "Show" option in the Prompt Suggestions from dropdown to suggest showing the user profile using the Single Sign On feature in the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Press the Enter key to submit the "show" command in the Microsoft Teams chat input box within the sso-botdev conversation.
